name: assistant-desk
description: Desktop AI coding workspace with assistant chat, terminal, and multi-project explorer.
author: Zhang Chi

scripts.native:repair: npm rebuild better-sqlite3 && npm run electron:rebuild-node-pty
scripts.electron:install-app-deps: SDKROOT=$(xcrun --show-sdk-path) CPATH=$(xcrun --show-sdk-path)/usr/include/c++/v1 CPLUS_INCLUDE_PATH=$(xcrun --show-sdk-path)/usr/include/c++/v1 npm_config_python=/usr/bin/python3 electron-builder install-app-deps
scripts.electron:rebuild-node-pty: SDKROOT=$(xcrun --show-sdk-path) CPATH=$(xcrun --show-sdk-path)/usr/include/c++/v1 CPLUS_INCLUDE_PATH=$(xcrun --show-sdk-path)/usr/include/c++/v1 npm_config_python=/usr/bin/python3 npm rebuild node-pty --build-from-source --target=40.8.0 --arch=arm64 --dist-url=https://electronjs.org/headers
scripts.electron:dev: concurrently -k -n VITE,ELECTRON -c cyan,magenta "vite --host 127.0.0.1 --strictPort" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 && VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 npx electron ./electron/main.cjs"
scripts.release:prepare: npm run icon:build && npm run build && npm run electron:build && npm run dist:dir
scripts.dist: if [ -f /tmp/system-root-cas.pem ]; then export NODE_EXTRA_CA_CERTS=/tmp/system-root-cas.pem; fi; npm run icon:build && npm run build && npm run electron:build && npm run electron:install-app-deps && electron-builder --publish never
scripts.dist:mac:arm64: if [ -f /tmp/system-root-cas.pem ]; then export NODE_EXTRA_CA_CERTS=/tmp/system-root-cas.pem; fi; npm run icon:build && npm run build && npm run electron:build && npm run electron:install-app-deps && electron-builder --publish never --mac dmg zip --arm64
scripts.dist:mac:x64: if [ -f /tmp/system-root-cas.pem ]; then export NODE_EXTRA_CA_CERTS=/tmp/system-root-cas.pem; fi; npm run icon:build && npm run build && npm run electron:build && npm run electron:install-app-deps && electron-builder --publish never --mac dmg zip --x64
scripts.dist:mac:universal: if [ -f /tmp/system-root-cas.pem ]; then export NODE_EXTRA_CA_CERTS=/tmp/system-root-cas.pem; fi; npm run icon:build && npm run build && npm run electron:build && npm run electron:install-app-deps && electron-builder --publish never --mac dmg zip --universal
scripts.dist:dir: if [ -f /tmp/system-root-cas.pem ]; then export NODE_EXTRA_CA_CERTS=/tmp/system-root-cas.pem; fi; npm run icon:build && npm run build && npm run electron:build && npm run electron:install-app-deps && electron-builder --publish never --dir
